above_on_both_axes: How many profile segments are above {threshold} on both adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
Count the profiles with values greater than {threshold} on both adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}".
Using highlighted adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}", how many profiles are above {threshold} on both axes?
How many labeled profiles sit above {threshold} on each of the adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
below_on_both_axes: How many profile segments are below {threshold} on both adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
Count the profiles with values less than {threshold} on both adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}".
Using highlighted adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}", how many profiles are below {threshold} on both axes?
How many labeled profiles sit below {threshold} on each of the adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
above_on_one_below_on_other: How many profile segments are above {threshold} on "{axis_i}" and below {threshold} on adjacent axis "{axis_j}"?
Count the profiles with "{axis_i}" greater than {threshold} and adjacent axis "{axis_j}" less than {threshold}.
Using highlighted adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}", how many profiles are above {threshold} on "{axis_i}" but below {threshold} on "{axis_j}"?
How many labeled profiles cross from above {threshold} on "{axis_i}" to below {threshold} on adjacent axis "{axis_j}"?
largest_increase_between_axes: Which profile has the largest increase from "{axis_i}" to adjacent axis "{axis_j}"?
Compare each line segment from "{axis_i}" to "{axis_j}". Which profile increases the most?
Which labeled profile rises by the greatest amount between adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
From "{axis_i}" to adjacent axis "{axis_j}", which profile shows the largest positive change?
Which profile line segment has the greatest upward change from "{axis_i}" to "{axis_j}"?
largest_decrease_between_axes: Which profile has the largest decrease from "{axis_i}" to adjacent axis "{axis_j}"?
Compare each line segment from "{axis_i}" to "{axis_j}". Which profile decreases the most?
Which labeled profile falls by the greatest amount between adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
From "{axis_i}" to adjacent axis "{axis_j}", which profile shows the largest negative change?
Which profile line segment has the greatest downward change from "{axis_i}" to "{axis_j}"?
largest_absolute_change_between_axes: Which profile has the largest absolute change between adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
Ignoring direction, which profile changes the most between adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
Which labeled profile has the greatest value difference between adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
Compare the size of each profile segment change between "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}". Which is largest?
Which profile line segment has the largest separation between its values on "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
all_crossings_between_adjacent_axes: How many pairwise line crossings occur between "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
Between the adjacent axes "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}", how many pairs of profile lines cross?
Count the line-crossing pairs between "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}".
How many profile-line intersections are formed between "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}"?
Looking only between "{axis_i}" and "{axis_j}", how many pairs reverse order?

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

query:above_on_both_axes.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:above_on_both_axes.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of line segments, one segment for each counted profile between the two named axes; each segment is [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] in pixel coordinates

query:below_on_both_axes.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:below_on_both_axes.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of line segments, one segment for each counted profile between the two named axes; each segment is [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] in pixel coordinates

query:above_on_one_below_on_other.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:above_on_one_below_on_other.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of line segments, one segment for each counted profile between the two named axes; each segment is [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] in pixel coordinates

query:largest_increase_between_axes.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible profile label as a string
query:largest_increase_between_axes.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the answer profile segment between the two named axes as [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] in pixel coordinates

query:largest_decrease_between_axes.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible profile label as a string
query:largest_decrease_between_axes.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the answer profile segment between the two named axes as [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] in pixel coordinates

query:largest_absolute_change_between_ax.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible profile label as a string
query:largest_absolute_change_between_ax.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the answer profile segment between the two named axes as [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]] in pixel coordinates

query:all_crossings_between_adjacent_axe.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:all_crossings_between_adjacent_axe.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points, one point at each counted line crossing between the two named axes
